expectations.evidence: Created RULE-3 with statement 'Each notification channel must own its own retry policy' sourced as 'designer'. Correctly identified the designer's directive as a RULE.
NC-1 has grounding array ['EVID-4','EVID-5','EVID-6','RULE-3','EVID-3'], reasoning_chain with IF...THEN, and collapse_test.
Grounding references EVID-3 (existing), EVID-4/5/6 (added this turn), RULE-3 (added this turn). All exist in proof state.
Contains: 'IF three new channels are requested (EVID-3), AND email retries are cheap (EVID-4)... THEN the channel abstraction must support pluggable per-channel retry policies'
